docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAES ACQUISITION CORP DBA SAN FRANCISCO ELEVATOR AS TO DEFENDANT YORK VENTURES, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-02-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-18-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST GARY L. SWEET FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-09-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-26-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VALERIE PAPALE. (212).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SANCTION PAYMENT FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT OSC HRG ON: DEC-09-2003 DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NAES ACQUISITION CORP DBA SAN FRANCISCO ELEVATOR

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-11-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-02-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAES ACQUISITION CORP DBA SAN FRANCISCO ELEVATOR
